AssociatePatchToManifestJob.description: Grants permission to associate a patch file with the manifest file to update the manifest file

CreateBatch.description: Grants permission to create a GT+ Batch

CreateIntakeForm.description: Grants permission to create intake form

CreateProject.description: Grants permission to create a GT+ Project

CreateWorkflowDefinition.description: Grants permission to create a GT+ Workflow Definition

DescribeConsoleJob.description: Grants permission to get status of GroundTruthLabeling Jobs

GenerateLIDARPreviewTaskConfigJob.description: Grants permission to generate LiDAR Preview Task

GetBatch.description: Grants permission to get a GT+ Batch

GetIntakeFormStatus.description: Grants permission to get a intake forms

ListBatches.description: Grants permission to list a GT+ Batchs

ListDatasetObjects.description: Grants permission to list dataset objects in a manifest file

ListProjects.description: Grants permission to list a GT+ Projects

RunFilterOrSampleDatasetJob.description: Grants permission to filter records from a manifest file using S3 select. Get sample entries based on random sampling

RunGenerateManifestByCrawlingJob.description: Grants permission to list a S3 prefix and create manifest files from objects in that location

RunGenerateManifestMetricsJob.description: Grants permission to generate metrics from objects in manifest

UpdateBatch.description: Grants permission to update a GT+ Batch
